---
title: "Week 01: Cohort Assembly"
author: "Shubho Banerjee"
date: "2026-07-07"
toc: true
toc-location: left
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Introduction

The goal of this notebook is to assemble an analysis-ready cohort from the AI-READI dataset. Participant information is combined with CGM, wearable, and clinical data to summarize data availability, perform quality control checks, and define cohorts for future analysis.
